acquisition_method: Full official repository clone with partial blob transfer; HEAD and root tree resolved locally, tracked inventory counted, and benchmark READMEs plus core context-optimizer implementation inspected.
timing_boundary: The inspected commit is 13 days after arXiv v1 and predates arXiv v3 by more than seven months. The paper does not pin a repository revision, so this release supports code-release inspection but cannot establish exact paper-time code identity for either version.
release_notes: The pinned tree contains executable pipelines, context-optimizer code, prompts/configuration, and 300 OfficeBench task JSON files across the AppWorld, OfficeBench, and 8-objective QA experiment families. No tracked run outputs, result summaries, or trajectory files were found. Upstream AppWorld data and the QA retriever corpus require separate downloads; the repository therefore does not by itself reproduce the paper results.
limitations: No tag points at the inspected commit and the paper does not identify a commit.
No duplicate source archive or clone is retained in the repository; the immutable commit, root tree, selected blob IDs, and inspection inventory provide refetchable provenance.
Acquisition and extraction do not constitute a deep review or an independent reproduction of reported experiments.
